change_description: Fixed grid size (100 instead of 10), color scheme (purple/magenta monochrome instead of rainbow), and camera position (ground-level y=1 looking at horizon instead of elevated y=6 looking at center)

changes.change: Changed grid size from 10 to 100 to match reference
Changed color scheme to purple/magenta monochrome (hue 0.75-0.85)
Changed camera to ground-level (y=1) looking at horizon

root_cause: Grid size, color scheme, and camera position didn't match the threejs.org reference. The reference shows a large field of 100x100 purple/magenta cubes from ground level, not a small 10x10 rainbow grid from above.
fix_pattern: Match reference rendering parameters: grid size, color palette, and camera perspective are critical visual features that must match exactly.
notes: Screenshot captured after manual fix. Kimi comparison needs to be run with KIMI_API_KEY to verify improvement score.
